response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls well short of a Director-level Principal Engineer bar focused on AI strategy. No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, no advanced degree, no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale, and total experience (~14 years post-2012) is borderline against the 15-year minimum.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack engineer with web, mobile, embedded, and infra breadth
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial drive
concerns: No track record of AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks Director-level IC scope: no evidence of org-wide influence or customer advisory
No advanced degree and limited cloud-architecture depth beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
